CustomField.description: Minimum confidence required for a suggestion to be kept.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Confidence measures how often the suggestion follows the trigger, given all times the trigger appears. We use smoothing: (support + 1) / (triggerCount + 2). Enter a value between 0 and 100%. Example: triggerCount=20, support=5 → smoothed confidence ≈ (5+1)/(20+2)=27%. With MIN_CONFIDENCE=30%, this suggestion is filtered out.
CustomField.label: Minimum confidence level
